channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ICICIAMC] SEBI Approves Change in Control of ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd has received an email from ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited informing about the receipt of a letter dated March 2, 2026 from Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) approving the change in control of the investment manager and sponsor of certain Category Il Alternative Investment Funds (AIF) schemes. The approval is valid for a period of six months and is subject to payment of fees as applicable under SEBI (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012.

  • SEBI approves change in control of ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited
  • Approval is valid for a period of six months and subject to payment of fees as applicable
  • ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd to take suitable action in discussion with ICICI Ventures Funds Management Company Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [GREENPANEL] Greenpanel Industries Ltd: Income Tax Department Conducts Search Proceedings
item.description:
Greenpanel Industries Limited, a leading company in the industry, has informed the exchange about the search proceedings conducted by the Income Tax Department at its registered office, other offices, plant locations, and the residence of the Promoter and an ex-employee. The search commenced on February 26, 2026, and concluded on March 2, 2026. The company has fully cooperated with the Income Tax authorities during the course of the proceedings.

  • Income Tax Department conducted search proceedings at the registered office, other offices, plant locations of the Company, and at the residence of the Promoter and an ex-employee.
  • The search commenced at 6.25 A.M. on February 26, 2026 and concluded at 7:00 P.M. on March 2, 2026.
  • Certain books of accounts, documents, and digital data were seized during the search proceedings.
  • The company has fully cooperated with the Income Tax authorities during the course of the proceedings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Greenpanel Industries Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [GRNLAMIND] Greenlam Industries Ltd: Income Tax Department Conducts Search Under IT Act
item.description:
Greenlam Industries Ltd announced that the Income Tax Department conducted a search under the Income Tax Act, 1961 at the Registered Office of the Company and its subsidiary Greenlam Limited and also at two Manufacturing Units of the Company. The Company fully cooperated with the officials of the Department and responded to the clarifications and details sought by them. The business operations of the Company continued without any disruption despite the search. The Company will comply with its legal obligation for further disclosure in this regard.

  • Income Tax Department conducted a search under the Income Tax Act, 1961 at Greenlam Industries Ltd and its subsidiary
  • Search also conducted at two Manufacturing Units of the Company
  • Company cooperated fully with the officials of the Department
  • Company responded to the clarifications and details sought by the Department
  • Business operations of the Company continued without any disruption despite the search

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Greenlam Industries Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Subsidiary Executes 450 MW Power Purchase Agreements with SJVN Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Greentech Seventh Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of ACME Solar Holdings Limited, has executed two Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) with SJVN Limited for contract capacities of 300 MW and 150 MW, totaling 450 MW under a Firm and Dispatchable Renewable Energy (FDRE) Power Project. The project has a scheduled commencement of supply date on 01.03.2028 with a 25-year tenure from the date of SCSD. The tariff for the project is set at Rs. 6.74 per unit.

  • ACME Greentech Seventh Private Limited executes PPAs with SJVN Limited for 450 MW FDRE Power Project
  • Project scheduled to commence supply on 01.03.2028 with a 25-year tenure
  • Tariff for the project is set at Rs. 6.74 per unit
  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited is the parent company of the subsidiary executing the agreements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [RRKABEL] R R Kabel Ltd Appoints Mrs. Kamaljeet Kaur as Chief Human Resource Officer
item.description:
R R Kabel Ltd has appointed Mrs. Kamaljeet Kaur as the Chief Human Resource Officer designated as Senior Management Personnel, with effect from 9 March 2026. Mrs. Kaur holds a Bachelor of Arts degree with Honors in Economics and a Post Graduate Diploma in Management with specialization in Human Resource Management. She brings over 22 years of extensive and diverse experience across various sectors. She has been responsible for leading and driving Strategic HR and organizational transformation, developing leadership capacities and capabilities, digital HR and building high-performing teams.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Kamaljeet Kaur as Chief Human Resource Officer
  • Mrs. Kaur's extensive experience of over 22 years in various sectors
  • Her expertise in corporate and plant-level HR, Industrial Relations and Administration
  • Her role in leading and driving Strategic HR and organizational transformation
  • Her responsibility in developing leadership capacities and capabilities, digital HR and building high-performing teams

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R R Kabel Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AARTIDRUGS] Aarti Drugs Ltd Incorporates New Step Down Subsidiary, Tripharma Chile SpA
item.description:
Aarti Drugs Ltd, a prominent manufacturer of bulk drugs and chemicals, has announced the incorporation of a step down subsidiary, Tripharma Chile SpA, in Chile. This new entity, a wholly owned subsidiary of Pinnacle Chile SpA (which is itself a subsidiary of Aarti Drugs Ltd), is incorporated for marketing formulation drugs and participating in tender and private market in Chile. The cost of subscription for Tripharma Chile SpA is Chilean Peso 10,00,000 as a Share Capital Contribution.

  • Aarti Drugs Ltd incorporates a step down subsidiary, Tripharma Chile SpA, in Chile.
  • Tripharma Chile SpA is a wholly owned subsidiary of Pinnacle Chile SpA, which is a subsidiary of Aarti Drugs Ltd.
  • The new subsidiary is incorporated for marketing formulation drugs and participating in tender and private market in Chile.
  • The cost of subscription for Tripharma Chile SpA is Chilean Peso 10,00,000 as a Share Capital Contribution.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AARTI DRUGS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [LGT] LGT Business Connextions Ltd: Board Meeting Approves Shifting of Registered Office and Appointment of Two Additional Directors
item.description:
LGT Business Connextions Ltd, formerly known as LGT Business Connextions Private Limited, announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on 2nd March 2026. The company will shift its registered office to a new location in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The Board also approved the appointment of Mr. Dhawal Padmakar Bhute and Mr. Chintan Virendra Chheda as Additional Directors of the company. Mr. Bhute holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree and has strong professional expertise in Tourism and International Trade. Mr. Chheda is an entrepreneur with over 25 years of leadership experience in corporate travel, international sales, and event participation. The company also approved the issuance of a Postal Ballot Notice for seeking shareholders’ approval.

  • Shifting of registered office to Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  • Appointment of Mr. Dhawal Padmakar Bhute as Additional Director
  • Appointment of Mr. Chintan Virendra Chheda as Additional Director
  • Mr. Bhute's expertise in Tourism and International Trade
  • Mr. Chheda's leadership experience in corporate travel and international sales

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LGT Business Connextions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LGT] LGT Business Connextions Ltd Appoints Two Additional Directors
item.description:
LGT Business Connextions Ltd has appointed Mr. Dhawal Padmakar Bhute and Mr. Chintan Virendra Chheda as Additional Directors to the board of the company. The appointments were made during the Board Meeting held on 2nd March 2026. The company also announced the shifting of its Registered office to Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

  • LGT Business Connextions Ltd appointed Mr. Dhawal Padmakar Bhute and Mr. Chintan Virendra Chheda as Additional Directors
  • The appointments were made during the Board Meeting held on 2nd March 2026
  • The company also announced the shifting of its Registered office to Chennai, Tamil Nadu

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LGT Business Connextions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [3IINFOTECH] 3i Infotech Ltd Receives Purchase Order Worth ₹ 3.19 Crores from a Leading Asset Management Company
item.description:
🔥 Trending

3i Infotech Ltd has received a purchase order from a leading asset management company in India for the set-up of enterprise-grade hyperconverged infrastructure solutions. The engagement involves setting up Nutanix-based infrastructure platforms with 5-year production-level support. The total value of the purchase order is approximately ₹ 3.19 crores.

  • 3i Infotech Ltd receives a purchase order from a leading asset management company in India.
  • The order involves the set-up of enterprise-grade hyperconverged infrastructure solutions.
  • The engagement includes setting up Nutanix-based infrastructure platforms with 5-year production-level support.
  • The total value of the purchase order is approximately ₹ 3.19 crores.
  • The order is in compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 3I INFOTECH LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DLCL] Dr Lalchandani Labs Ltd Approves Basis of Allotment under Rights Issue
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dr Lalchandani Labs Ltd has approved the allotment of 43,04,000 (Forty-Three Lakhs Four Thousand) fully paid-up equity shares of the face value of *10 each, following the Rights Issue that opened on February 04, 2026, and closed on February 27, 2026. The allotment is at an issue price of Rs. 10/- per equity share. The Board of Directors also approved the increase in the paid-up equity share capital of the Company to Rs. 8,63,70,680 (8 Crores 63 Lakhs 70 Thousand 680 Only).

  • Dr Lalchandani Labs Ltd approves the allotment of 43,04,000 equity shares under the Rights Issue.
  • The Rights Issue opened on February 04, 2026, and closed on February 27, 2026.
  • The allotment is at an issue price of Rs. 10/- per equity share.
  • The paid-up equity share capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 8,63,70,680.
  • The decision was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on March 02, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dr Lalchandani Labs Ltd | Category: Right Issue
